claims.claim: January 2026 standard residential electricity tariff is approximately 64.32 agorot/kWh (0.6432 ILS/kWh) including 18% VAT (54.51 ag/kWh pre-VAT).
Electricity tariff was raised by 1.5% effective 1 January 2026; switched to automatic semi-annual updates based on USD exchange rate and CPI.
January 2026 TOU rates incl. 18% VAT: off-peak (shefel) ~52.83 agorot/kWh; summer weekday peak (shia) ~168.95 agorot/kWh.
TOU has had only two tiers (peak / off-peak) since April 2023; the middle 'geva' shoulder tier was eliminated.
By end of 2025, approximately 280,000 (some sources 300,000+) Israeli households had switched to private electricity suppliers, with typical discounts of 5-20% off IEC generation portion.
claims.source_title: Calcalist - 280,000 customers moved to private suppliers in 2025

claims.claim: Israeli VAT was raised from 17% to 18% on 1 January 2025; a proposal to raise to 19% in January 2026 was rejected by the cabinet in December 2025.

Seniors receiving old-age pension plus income supplement from Bituach Leumi get a 50% discount on electricity consumption up to 400 kWh/month (800 kWh bi-monthly); max benefit ~129 NIS/month as of Jan 2026.
claims.source_title: Kol Zchut - electricity discount for senior with income supplement

claims.claim: Energy Minister is advancing plan to deepen the electricity discount for seniors + Holocaust survivors from 50% to 65% on up to 400 kWh/month; not yet enacted.
IEC has completed installation of approximately 1 million smart meters (~30% of households) as of 2026; announced target of 3.7 million by end-2028. Self-paid installation ~260 ILS, 2-12 week wait.
claims.source_title: Calcalist - IEC completed 1M smart meter installations

claims.claim: Residential rooftop solar net-metering surplus export tariff (decision 1573) is ~0.48 ILS/kWh fixed for 25 years; 2025 two-track proposal pays ~0.60 ILS/kWh for first 5 years then ~0.38 ILS/kWh (installations up to 30 kW, higher rate for first 15 kW).
claims.source_title: PV Magazine - Israel plans two tariffs for rooftop solar under net metering

claims.claim: January 2026 residential water Tier 1 tariff is ~8.51 ILS/m³ including VAT and sewage; allocation 7 m³/person per bi-monthly billing period (3.5 m³/person/month), minimum 14 m³ per dwelling per bi-monthly period.
claims.source_title: Water Authority - water and sewage tariffs page

claims.claim: January 2026 residential water Tier 2 tariff (above allocation) is ~15.62 ILS/m³ including VAT and sewage, approximately 84% more expensive than Tier 1.
Energy Ministry publishes locality-specific LPG cooking-gas comparison calculator; price variance between suppliers for a 12kg balloon can be up to 92 NIS per balloon in the same city.
claims.source_title: Energy Ministry - GPM (LPG) price comparison calculator

claims.claim: Rami Levy Mobile (MVNO on Pelephone network) offers unlimited calls + 50GB+ data plans starting around 20 NIS/month with no commitment.
Golan Telecom unlimited plans start around 30 NIS/month; 019 Mobile Bundle Ten plan is 10 NIS/month for 100MB data + 100 minutes (entry-level, not unlimited).
January 2026 fiber-optic internet pricing: HOT-Net 1Gbps ~99 NIS/month, Bezeq BFiber 300Mbps ~109 NIS/month, BFiber 1Gbps ~149 NIS/month, Partner fiber 1Gbps ~195 NIS/month.
claims.source_title: Poenta - fiber optic plan comparison 2026 Bezeq HOT Partner Cellcom

claims.claim: IBC/Unlimited fiber network covers ~260 localities in Israel as of 2026 with symmetric speeds 100Mbps-5Gbps.
January 2026 national arnona annual update is 1.626% (linkage formula based on Treasury index); Rishon LeZion received approved exceptional increase of +5.18% (3.5pp above national).
claims.source_title: Gornitzky GNY - 2026 arnona annual update rate 1.626%

claims.claim: Ministry of Interior approved exceptional arnona increase of 5.18% for residential properties in Rishon LeZion for 2026 (justified by metro construction works); total expected revenue +23.6M NIS/year.
claims.source_title: Globes - 2026 arnona increases approved and rejected

claims.claim: Olim chadashim arnona discount is up to 90% on first 100 sqm for 12 months out of the 24 months following aliyah registration (single benefit, not yearly). Disabled olim recognized by Bituach Leumi get up to 80% with no time limit.

Senior arnona discount eligibility: women age 62 / men age 67 (statutory retirement age). 30% discount if income below average wage; up to 100% if also receiving income supplement from Bituach Leumi. Discounts do not stack (regulation תקנות הסדרים במשק המדינה הנחה מארנונה תשנ"ג-1993).
Mobile number portability in Israel is free, handled by the new supplier, and typically completes in ~1 business day. No customer-side paperwork required.
Energy Ministry plans to shorten the electricity supplier switching window from 14 days to 7 days during 2026; January 2026 tender expanded to 500 MW.
claims.source_title: Globes English - discounted electricity to expand

claims.claim: IEC customer service phone number is 103 (also reachable as 055-7000103 for SMS/WhatsApp). Legacy *2730 short code is no longer in use.

Israeli small claims court (בית משפט לתביעות קטנות) has a 38,500 NIS cap in 2026; often used for IEC and water-corporation billing disputes (not arnona, which uses a separate hassagah/ועדת ערר track).
claims.source_title: Gov.il - small claims court service page
